title: Marvex tp
description: Marvex TP is a texture pack which adds many nice features and tries to look good for pvp and just playing the game normally
body:
marvex custom texture pack adds features such as 

• Nice crystals for pvp.

• Better block textures for pvp related blocks

• short swords

• Differnet golden apple

• Better netherite armor

• short fire

• Clean hud

• Recipie reminder in brewing stands

• Nice start backgrounds

• And much more
